title: Korean-Style Fried Rice
description: A simple and flavorful fried rice recipe inspired by Korean cuisine, made with crispy rice, savory vegetables, and spicy gochujang. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or meal prep.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Push the scallions to one side of the pan.
Add the cooked rice to the other side of the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes, breaking up any clumps.
Add the gochujang, soy sauce, and sesame oil (if using) to the rice and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the frozen peas and carrots to the rice and stir-fry until they are thawed and heated through.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and top with crispy scallions.
